queries.question: Ids of Boise residents or Aetna-insured patients (either condition).
queries.reference_sql: SELECT patient_id FROM patients WHERE city = 'Boise' OR insurance_provider = 'Aetna'

queries.question: Ids of Boise residents.
queries.reference_sql: SELECT patient_id FROM patients WHERE city = 'Boise'

queries.question: Ids of Boise residents that are also Aetna-insured patients.
queries.reference_sql: SELECT patient_id FROM patients WHERE city = 'Boise' AND insurance_provider = 'Aetna'

queries.question: Ids of chronic patients or Medicaid patients (either condition).
queries.reference_sql: SELECT patient_id FROM patients WHERE chronic_condition = 'yes' OR insurance_provider = 'Medicaid'

queries.question: Ids of chronic patients.
queries.reference_sql: SELECT patient_id FROM patients WHERE chronic_condition = 'yes'

queries.question: Ids of chronic patients that are also Medicaid patients.
queries.reference_sql: SELECT patient_id FROM patients WHERE chronic_condition = 'yes' AND insurance_provider = 'Medicaid'

queries.question: Ids of delivered orders or orders shipped to Portland (either condition).
queries.reference_sql: SELECT order_id FROM orders WHERE order_status = 'delivered' OR shipping_city = 'Portland'

queries.question: Ids of delivered orders.
queries.reference_sql: SELECT order_id FROM orders WHERE order_status = 'delivered'

queries.question: Ids of delivered orders that are also orders shipped to Portland.
queries.reference_sql: SELECT order_id FROM orders WHERE order_status = 'delivered' AND shipping_city = 'Portland'

queries.question: Ids of completed appointments or checkup visits (either condition).
queries.reference_sql: SELECT appointment_id FROM appointments WHERE status = 'completed' OR visit_type = 'checkup'

queries.question: Ids of completed appointments.
queries.reference_sql: SELECT appointment_id FROM appointments WHERE status = 'completed'

queries.question: Ids of completed appointments that are also checkup visits.
queries.reference_sql: SELECT appointment_id FROM appointments WHERE status = 'completed' AND visit_type = 'checkup'

queries.question: Ids of electronics products or products above 200 (either condition).
queries.reference_sql: SELECT product_id FROM products WHERE category = 'electronics' OR unit_price > 200

queries.question: Ids of electronics products.
queries.reference_sql: SELECT product_id FROM products WHERE category = 'electronics'

queries.question: Ids of electronics products that are also products above 200.
queries.reference_sql: SELECT product_id FROM products WHERE category = 'electronics' AND unit_price > 200

queries.question: Ids of unpaid invoices or invoices above 300 (either condition).
queries.reference_sql: SELECT invoice_id FROM invoices WHERE payment_status = 'unpaid' OR total_amount > 300

queries.question: Ids of unpaid invoices.
queries.reference_sql: SELECT invoice_id FROM invoices WHERE payment_status = 'unpaid'

queries.question: Ids of unpaid invoices that are also invoices above 300.
queries.reference_sql: SELECT invoice_id FROM invoices WHERE payment_status = 'unpaid' AND total_amount > 300

queries.question: Ids of high-flag results or glucose tests (either condition).
queries.reference_sql: SELECT lab_id FROM lab_results WHERE result_flag = 'high' OR test_name = 'glucose'

queries.question: Ids of high-flag results.
queries.reference_sql: SELECT lab_id FROM lab_results WHERE result_flag = 'high'

queries.question: Ids of high-flag results that are also glucose tests.
queries.reference_sql: SELECT lab_id FROM lab_results WHERE result_flag = 'high' AND test_name = 'glucose'

queries.question: Ids of gold customers or Tacoma customers (either condition).
queries.reference_sql: SELECT customer_id FROM customers WHERE loyalty_level = 'gold' OR city = 'Tacoma'

queries.question: Ids of gold customers.
queries.reference_sql: SELECT customer_id FROM customers WHERE loyalty_level = 'gold'

queries.question: Ids of gold customers that are also Tacoma customers.
queries.reference_sql: SELECT customer_id FROM customers WHERE loyalty_level = 'gold' AND city = 'Tacoma'

queries.question: Customer ids with loyalty in ('gold', 'platinum').
queries.reference_sql: SELECT customer_id FROM customers WHERE loyalty_level IN ('gold', 'platinum')

queries.question: Player ids on 2015 batting records for teams in ('AL', 'NL').
queries.reference_sql: SELECT playerID FROM Batting WHERE yearID = 2015 AND teamID IN ('AL', 'NL')
